message:
refactor: Split all files over 500 lines into organized modules

Agent 1 (native_types & others):
- Split native_types.zig (753→5 modules)
- Split assign.zig (522→431 + defer module)
- Created native_types/core.zig, inferrer.zig, etc
- Created assign_defer.zig for cleanup logic

Agent 2 (control flow):
- Split control.zig (630→14 re-export)
- Created control/loops.zig (586 lines)
- Created control/conditionals.zig (50 lines)

Agent 3 (codebase audit - split 5 more files):
- Split main.zig (579→34 + 4 modules)
- Split codegen/native/main.zig (789→18 + 3 modules)
- Split parser/statements.zig (609→30 + 5 modules)
- Split comptime_eval.zig (665→325 + 2 modules)
- Split control/loops.zig (586→12 + 3 modules)

Result:
- ✅ ZERO files over 500 lines
- ✅ Clean re-export structure
- ✅ No regressions (tests still pass)
- ✅ Builds successfully
- Total: 8 large files split into 30+ focused modules

All modules organized into subdirectories with re-export files maintaining API compatibility.
